name: CHR_Archer_A.glb
author: AI 3D + Mixamo rig + archer_idle/run/shooting + Longbow walk set + skill/walk + hit/dodge/die
notes: 减骨 65->20（剪手指/脚趾/HeadTop_End，重挂 Hand/Foot/Head）。动画 11 段全 player_* 命名：player_idle(archer_idle)/player_run(archer_run)/player_attack(archer_shooting)/player_walk+back/left/right(Longbow)/player_skill(standing aim overdraw)/player_hit+player_dodge+player_die(下载 Mixamo)。贴图压 512²，减面到 2800 三角。8 sockets 父级到对应骨，1 capsule 碰撞体。武器依赖 CHR_Archer_A_Weapon。
